description_long: This object is a thick, raw steak cut with a prominent bone running through one side, resembling a T-bone or porterhouse steak. The surface displays a vivid red coloration with intricate white marbling of fat distributed throughout the muscle tissue, giving it a realistic, fresh appearance. The steak has a substantial layer of white fat along one edge, and the bone structure is clearly visible, adding to its authenticity. The texture appears moist and slightly glossy, with visible muscle fibers and fat streaks. No grill marks or signs of cooking are present, indicating it is uncooked. There are no garnishes, sauces, or plating elements visible around the steak.
description: A thick, raw steak with a prominent bone and heavy white fat marbling, featuring a vivid red color and realistic muscle texture.
description_view_0: This view highlights the broad, flat surface of the steak, showing the bone and a thick layer of fat along the edge.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the thickness of the steak and the cross-section of the bone, with visible marbling on the cut face.
description_view_2: This view displays the opposite side, focusing on the long, marbled muscle and the edge of the bone.
description_view_3: This angled view showcases the bone protrusion and the layered fat and muscle structure, with clear marbling.
attribute_grill_marks: No grill marks are visible on the steak; the surface is smooth and uncooked.
attribute_visible_fat_marbling: Heavy fat marbling is present and is evenly distributed throughout the steak.
